subcodes.first_line: O servant, hearken unto that which the Spirit imparteth unto thee, then follow what thou hast been commanded, that thou mayest be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع یا عبد ما یلقیک الروح ثم اتبع ما امرت به لتکون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @recompense; reward for belief; right action
